Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: Desta Krupa sues neighbor Marie for $571.67, claiming she’s stuck paying for an Xbox and iPod bought on her line of credit. Marie counters, blaming payment issues on the credit company and says the iPod was a gift.
Video.title: Feuding Friends

Video.summary: James, a self-proclaimed "Karma Casanova," must answer for his disrespectful behavior in his relationship with girlfriend Shana.
Video.title: Few vs. Roundtree

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: A car sale between coworkers started off sour turned bitter and ended with a sweet old lady.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt attempts to find the man responsible for giving his girlfriend a black eye. A woman is arrested behind a closed business in the middle of the night.
Video.title: Abusing and Abusers

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: SWAT carries out a mission to arrest a man wanted for assault with a deadly weapon.
Video.title: SWAT vs. Dirty Harry

Video.summary: A couple get into an argument after Deputy Katz makes a felony arrest. Deputy Dacanay responds to a man attempting to break into a neighbor's home with a shovel.
Video.title: Unhappy Wife, Unhappy Life

Video.summary: Deputy Miller gets physical with an aggressive transient. Deputy Turnbull demonstrates an exercise in mental gymnastics.
Video.title: Hostile & Homeless

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: After eight years together, Krystal's pregnancy sparks doubts about her fiancé's addictions and honesty, demanding clarity before marriage.
Video.title: Simmons vs. Stephens

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Theresa and Paul Cacciato are suing their former tenant, Theresa Kordulak, for $2,160, accusing her of damaging their furnace after leaving her pet grooming business. Kordulak denies the claim, stating the furnace never worked and countersues
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Furnace

Video.summary: Robert sues property manager Jorge for $10,000, claiming harassment, unlawful entry, and invasion of privacy. Jorge denies the accusations, says he's just doing his job, and countersues for $10,000, alleging he's the one being harassed.
Video.title: Nosey Landlord

Video.summary: Anthony Franco sues Anabel Orellana De Ramirez for $334.50, claiming she agreed to pay for extra luggage charges he covered to bring items for her family. Anabel denies owing him, saying the suit is revenge for rejecting his romantic advances.
Video.title: Suspicious Texts

Video.summary: Dave Shelton sues Gary Garver for $10,000, claiming unpaid wages for two years on Garver's radio show. Shelton says he quit due to on-air mistreatment, but Garver insists Shelton was just a guest and never requested payment.
Video.title: Radio Riot

Video.summary: Desherica Smith claims her mother owes her for covering food and bills while she lived there and insists she doesn’t owe rent. Shocked her mom is suing, she feels the case is petty. Desherica believes they’re even and expects to win.
Video.title: Mother/Daughter Courtroom Drama

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.
Video.title: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Image.alt: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Video.summary: Tylan is suing his great aunt, saying she hired him to paint her house but failed to pay.
Video.title: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Image.alt: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for rent and emotional distress because he cheated on her with their roommate.
Video.title: The Roommate Affair

Video.summary: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him in their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.
Video.title: Fuming Over a Mobile Home

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: Sarah sues her ex-husband for rent, saying their marriage fell apart due to trust issues and infidelity.
Video.title: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Image.alt: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: Melvin is suing a real estate broker for a bogus electric bill and lost rent, claiming she stole his identity to pay her bills. Jacqueline catogorically denies any of Melvin outrageous claims.
Video.title: Buyers are Liars

Video.summary: Did their office friendship go too far? Are her misconduct claims a cover for the money she owes?
Video.title: Gross Misconduct

Video.summary: Daryl is suing his ex-friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel a gambling addiction.
Video.title: Gambling the Friendship

Video.summary: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations?
Video.title: One Door Closes

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: Rosa says that Michael took her TV to repair and never brought it back and now she wants her money.
Video.title: Please Stand By

Video.summary: Priscilla is suing her disabled mother for the money she borrowed to purchase her wheelchair.
Video.title: Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Image.alt: Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Image.alt: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.
Video.title: The Car Driver

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
